items.title: Clarity over hype
items.description: Say the hard thing plainly. Reduce noise, surface the decision, and make the next step obvious.

items.title: Systems over features
items.description: Design the working whole, not isolated wins. The product should stay coherent as it grows.

items.title: Taste over noise
items.description: Favor restraint, proportion, and sharp language over clutter. The interface should feel composed.

items.title: Execution over decks
items.description: Ship the thing. Reduce ceremony, close the loop, and learn from real use.

items.title: Operating mode
items.description: Small team. High standard. End-to-end. No sprawl, no theater.
